narrative:
Coldwater West (precinct in Mercer County) has 838 registered voters, with 38.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 54.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 47.4 percentage points.
